name: mcp-server-aws-cost-explorer
description: MCP server for analyzing AWS costs and usage data through the AWS Cost Explorer API

rating.reason: Good documentation overall with comprehensive descriptions and detailed examples, but inconsistent parameter documentation quality. Tool descriptions are excellent with 3-4 sentences covering functionality, usage context, and key limitations. Most tools provide helpful examples and explain complex concepts well. However, some parameters lack adequate descriptions (e.g., 'tag_key' has minimal description), and there's occasional redundancy in descriptions that could be more concise. The technical accuracy and depth of AWS-specific guidance elevates the quality significantly.
